attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
A.IP_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
A.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE,
A.SECOND_SOURCE_FLAG,
A.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG,
A.POS_SOURCE_TYPE,
A.INSTALLATION_DT  ,
A.DU_INSTALLATION_QTY,
A.SCRUBBED_SERIAL_NUMBER,
A.INSTANCE_STATUS_CD ,           
A.SOURCE_ORDER_NUM,
A.DV_RMA_FLG       ,                                 
A.DU_WARRANTY_CNTRCT_LN_END_DT,
A.INSTALLED_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,     
A.IP_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY     ,
A.IP_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
A.SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_LAST_RNWL_DT ,
A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_EXPIRE_DTM,
A.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM ,
A.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM  ,
A.TERMINATED_DTM            ,    
A.TERMINATED_REASON_SHORT_DESCR,
A.SERVICE_STATUS_CD,
A.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
A.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_REF_QUOTE_NUM,
A.EXPIRATION_REASON_COMMENT,
A.CONTRACT_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
A.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_NUM,
A.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD,
A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_TYPE,        
A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM  ,
A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
A.SERVICE_CONTRACT_STATUS_CD,  
A.CONTRACT_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
A.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
A.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,
A.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
A.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY   ,           
A.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
A.IP_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,
PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT,
VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT,
VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
A.SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,     
A.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
A.POS_PRODUCT_KEY,
A.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT,
A.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT   ,
A.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
A.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  ,
A.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
A.TRANSACTION_DATE              ,
A.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   ,
A.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER       ,
A.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    ,
A.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM   ,
A.MARKET_TYPE_CODE              ,
A.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM (
SELECT 
STG1.IP_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  
,STG1.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE
,STG1.SECOND_SOURCE_FLAG
,STG1.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG
,STG1.POS_SOURCE_TYPE
,STG1.INSTALLATION_DT  
,STG1.DU_INSTALLATION_QTY
,STG1.SCRUBBED_SERIAL_NUMBER
,STG1.INSTANCE_STATUS_CD            
,STG1.SOURCE_ORDER_NUM
,STG1.DV_RMA_FLG                                        
,STG1.DU_WARRANTY_CNTRCT_LN_END_DT
,STG1.INSTALLED_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY      
,STG1.IP_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY     
,STG1.IP_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NSC.SOURCE_CREATE_DTM
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_LAST_RNWL_DT 
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_EXPIRE_DTM
,CASE WHEN STG1.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM = '1900-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL 
	ELSE STG1.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM
 END AS BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM

,CASE WHEN STG1.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM = '1900-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL 
	ELSE STG1.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM
 END AS SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM
  
,STG1.TERMINATED_DTM                
,STG1.TERMINATED_REASON_SHORT_DESCR
,STG1.SERVICE_STATUS_CD
,STG1.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
,NSCTS.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_REF_QUOTE_NUM
,NSCTS.EXPIRATION_REASON_COMMENT
,NSCTS.CONTRACT_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY
,STG1.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_NUM
,STG1.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_TYPE        
,CASE WHEN NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM = '1900-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL 
	ELSE NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM 
 END AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_STATUS_CD  
,NSCTS.BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY  AS CONTRACT_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,STG1.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
,STG1.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,STG1.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY 
,STG1.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY              
,STG1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,STG1.IP_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM
,SUM(STG1.PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT         ) AS PRODUCT_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(STG1.POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT      ) AS POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT
,SUM(STG1.VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT          ) AS VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT
,SUM(STG1.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT              )       AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT
,STG1.SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      
,STG1.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,STG1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,STG1.POS_PRODUCT_KEY
,SUM(STG1.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT ) AS BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT
,SUM(STG1.RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT    ) AS RPTD_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT
,STG1.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,STG1.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  
,STG1.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,STG1.TRANSACTION_DATE              
,STG1.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   
,STG1.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER       
,STG1.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    
,STG1.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM   
,STG1.MARKET_TYPE_CODE         
,STG1.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME      
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_POS_IP_SVC_MTH_INT_M STG1, $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_CONTRACT NSC, $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SVC_CNTRCT_TECH_SERVICES NSCTS
WHERE NSC.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM       = NSCTS.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM              
AND STG1.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM=  NSCTS.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
GROUP BY 
STG1.IP_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  
,STG1.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE
,STG1.SECOND_SOURCE_FLAG
,STG1.POS_TRX_LINE_ACTIVE_FLAG
,STG1.POS_SOURCE_TYPE
,STG1.INSTALLATION_DT  
,STG1.DU_INSTALLATION_QTY
,STG1.SCRUBBED_SERIAL_NUMBER
,STG1.INSTANCE_STATUS_CD            
,STG1.SOURCE_ORDER_NUM
,STG1.DV_RMA_FLG                                        
,STG1.DU_WARRANTY_CNTRCT_LN_END_DT
,STG1.INSTALLED_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY      
,STG1.IP_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY     
,STG1.IP_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NSC.SOURCE_CREATE_DTM
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_LAST_RNWL_DT 
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_EXPIRE_DTM
,CASE WHEN STG1.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM = '1900-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL 
	ELSE STG1.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM
 END AS BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM

,CASE WHEN STG1.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM = '1900-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL 
	ELSE STG1.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM
 END AS SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM
  
,STG1.TERMINATED_DTM                
,STG1.TERMINATED_REASON_SHORT_DESCR
,STG1.SERVICE_STATUS_CD
,STG1.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
,NSCTS.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_REF_QUOTE_NUM
,NSCTS.EXPIRATION_REASON_COMMENT
,NSCTS.CONTRACT_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY
,STG1.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_NUM
,STG1.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_TYPE        
,CASE WHEN NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM = '1900-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL 
	ELSE NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM 
 END AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM 
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,NSC.SERVICE_CONTRACT_STATUS_CD  
,NSCTS.BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY
,STG1.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
,STG1.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  
,STG1.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
,STG1.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY              
,STG1.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,STG1.IP_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM
,STG1.SOLD_TO_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      
,STG1.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
,STG1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,STG1.POS_PRODUCT_KEY
,STG1.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,STG1.DISTRIBUTOR_REPORTED_DEAL_ID  
,STG1.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,STG1.TRANSACTION_DATE              
,STG1.DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER   
,STG1.DISTI_2_CISCO_PO_NUMBER       
,STG1.RU_RSLR_TO_DISTI_PO_NUMBER    
,STG1.END_CUST_TO_RESELLER_PO_NUM   
,STG1.MARKET_TYPE_CODE             
,STG1.DIST_RPTD_SALES_REP_NAME ) A
